Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: Avro 504
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
A lightweight and highly reliable biplane used for training, reconnaissance, and light combat roles during the First World War. Simple to fly and easy to maintain, it became one of the most widely produced training aircraft of its era.

Being a flying vehicle, it is extremely obvious when on the move.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x1, Gunner x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
